function tokenOfOwnerByIndex(address owner, uint256 index) view returns (uint256)
function getAnchor(bytes32 dataHash) view returns (uint256 deviceId, uint256 timestamp, uint256 blockNumber)
event DeviceRegistered(uint256 indexed deviceId, address indexed owner, bytes32 firmwareHash)
event FirmwareUpdated(uint256 indexed deviceId, bytes32 oldHash, bytes32 newHash)
event DataAnchored(uint256 indexed deviceId, bytes32 indexed dataHash, uint256 timestamp, uint256 nonce)
